attacking_style: Late attacks on summit finishes, typically launching on the final climb to solo away from reduced groups. Shows willingness to go alone rather than wait for sprint finish.
team_tactics: Benefits from having multiple teammates in breaks to control tempo before late individual moves. Team appears to identify him as protected climber/leader in stage races.
terrain_preference: Summit finishes and sustained climbing efforts suit him best. Altitude training suggests preparation for high-mountain stages. Struggles to respond to explosive accelerations in breakaway scenarios.
vulnerability: Cannot match sharp, explosive accelerations from pure puncheurs despite being present in winning moves. Appears to lack final kick when racing against specialists with faster finishing speed.
key_patterns: Attacks late on final climbs in summit finishes, going solo (2 observations)
Positioned as team leader/protected rider in stage races at DSM/Jayco (2 observations)
Strong climbing form derived from altitude training camps at Andorra base (2 observations)
Present in winning breaks but vulnerable to explosive accelerations from puncheurs (2 observations)
form_trajectory: negative: Unable to convert numerical advantage into result at 2023 Bretagne Classic, suggesting declining ability to match top-level accelerations compared to earlier breakthrough wins
